ddls:
CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "app_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "language" TEXT /* Programming language used */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the application's purpose and functionality */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the application */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the application was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the application was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the application (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL of the application's source code repository */,
  "maintainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user responsible for maintaining the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_language FOREIGN KEY ("language") REFERENCES languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_maintainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("maintainer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each programming language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the programming language */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the programming language */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the language was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the language was last updated */,
  "compiler" TEXT /* Name of the compiler used for the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programming_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each programming model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the programming model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the programming model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the programming model was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the programming model was last updated */,
  "performance_benchmark" TEXT /* Benchmark performance metrics for the programming model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "third_party_libraries" (
  "library_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each third-party library */,
  "library_name" TEXT /* Name of the third-party library */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the third-party library */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the third-party library */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the library was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the library was last updated */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* Type of license under which the library is distributed */,
  "dependencies" TEXT /* List of dependencies required by the library */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("library_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "app_programming_models" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the programming model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id", "model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "app_third_party_libraries" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "library_id" INTEGER /* ID of the third-party library */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id", "library_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance profile */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "profile_date" TEXT /* Date when the profile was created */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Performance metrics and results */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the profile */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the profile */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_profiles_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_profiles_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_profiles_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, developer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user was last updated */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string of user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* ID of the profile being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the profile */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the profile was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_profile_id FOREIGN KEY ("profile_id") REFERENCES profiles ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "profile_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each profile version */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the profile */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the profile version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Change log of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_profile_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_profile_versions_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_profile_versions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "library_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each library version */,
  "library_id" INTEGER /* ID of the third-party library */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the library */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the library version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Change log of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_library_versions_library_id FOREIGN KEY ("library_id") REFERENCES third_party_libraries ("library_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_library_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_library_versions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the programming model */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the model version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Change log of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES programming_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependencies" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application's dependency */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., library, application) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id", "dependency_id")
)
